skills.name: superpowers:writing-plans
skills.content:
# Writing Plans

## Overview
Write comprehensive implementation plans...

report.execution_plan:
1. 需求分析：通过brainstorming确认API范围(用户注册/登录/Profile CRUD)，选定Go+Gin+PostgreSQL — skills: brainstorming | decisions: Gin优于Echo(中间件支持), PostgreSQL优于SQLite(生产就绪) | outcome: 确认4个核心端点
2. 架构设计：设计REST API架构，JWT auth中间件(access/refresh token模式)，编写TDD实现计划 — skills: writing-plans | decisions: access token 15min + refresh token 7d | outcome: 7步实现计划
3. 实现：实现routes/handlers/JWT生成验证/auth中间件/user model/数据库迁移 — decisions: JWT secret从环境变量读取 | outcome: 全部路由实现 | errors: [Turn 3] tool_failure: Write权限被拒
4. 测试：编写auth中间件和handler单元测试，修复2个token过期边界case — outcome: 12个测试全部通过 | errors: [Turn 5] runtime_error: npm test 2个失败, [Turn 6] user_correction: JWT secret应用环境变量
report.error_message:

report.task_description: Build a REST API with OAuth2 authentication using Python and FastAPI

skills.name: superpowers:brainstorming
skills.description: Help turn ideas into fully formed designs

report.execution_plan:
1. Solution replay: 依赖检查 — 复用社区方案(ID: sol_abc123, 匹配度72.5%, 原始: Go+Gin+JWT)，2个内建skill无需安装 | outcome: 依赖验证通过
2. Solution replay: 适配分析 — 对比原方案(Go+Gin+JWT 4步) vs 当前(Python+FastAPI+OAuth2)。Step1可复用, Step2-4需适配(Go→Python, Gin→FastAPI, JWT→OAuth2) | decisions: 保留4阶段结构, JWT中间件改OAuth2 flow | outcome: 适配计划1复用+3适配
3. Solution replay: 需求分析 — 复用原step1，brainstorming确认5个端点+OAuth2 provider(Google+GitHub) — skills: brainstorming | decisions: PostgreSQL+SQLAlchemy async ORM
4. Solution replay: 架构设计 — 适配原step2，OAuth2 authorization code+PKCE flow，FastAPI Depends()替代Gin中间件 — skills: writing-plans | decisions: Authlib库, FastAPI Depends() | outcome: 6步实现计划
5. Solution replay: 实现 — 适配原step3，FastAPI routes+OAuth2 callback handlers+token存储 — decisions: httpOnly cookies存token | outcome: 全部路由实现
6. Solution replay: 测试 — 适配原step4，pytest+httpx替代Go test，添加OAuth2 mock fixtures — decisions: pytest-asyncio, respx mock | outcome: 15个测试全部通过
